meta.title: RankAI - AI SEO/GEO Agency
meta.description: RankAI is the worlds first AI-native Agency for organic growth. It handles everything autonomously to drive you millions of visitors from Google & AI Search like ChatGPT. In other words, RankAI optimizes for both SEO & GEO.

We Run the Engine That Iterates Until It Works. From serving 200+ businesses, we found that SEO + GEO is won through iteration. RankAI uses a proprietary engine that continuously researches, publishes, measures, and rewrites until pages rank on Google and get cited by AI search. 1354% increase in search visibility Shortbread.ai +479 keywords on page 1 BuyUnityNow 5x increase in AI Mentions SkillCatApp 79% increase in organic traffic LiveTinted Proprietary Engine 200+ Businesses Served <30 days For Early Results Are you an agency? See how 50+ agencies deliver these results for their clients with RankAI. Learn more about Agency plans RankAI runs a proprietary engine, led by experts. Capturing Google and AI search traffic directly to your site 1 Expert-Led Research and Planning Human experts handle the highest-leverage work first — understanding your business, mapping the opportunity, and building the plan that powers the engine. Proprietary Knowledge Base We build a brand-specific knowledge base so the engine works from real business context, not generic SEO inputs. Growth Projections We project traffic upside using our proprietary model, trained from work across 200+ businesses. Search Opportunity We map the highest-value opportunities across Google and AI search.
